TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ciyaw Anang Paterungan a niyaru' U kaepudan nu lunalunan kiyaniyaru', tangasa i matini pangangan han tu Sinsiya. Ina niyaru' malatulu ira ku- Paterungan, Mararu'ung, Dipid, mitepar tu liyal silsil han namaka Bakung i makaterung, u saalumanay ku Kabalang a niyaru', padudu satu i Mararu'ung atu Dipid ku Pangcapangcahan. U Bakung ku sausi tu Sinsiya, tuwa malatulu ku nikasabenibenis: u Paterungan Kabalan a niyaru', u Makaterung atu Dipid i, u Pangcapangcahan a niyaru. Pi'arawan to lakaw #.E8.A1.8C.E6.94.BF.E5.8D.80.E5.8A.83 .
S.PHON: ʦijaw anaŋ patəro~u~uŋan a nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u kaəpo~u~uɬ~ɮan no~u~u ɾo~u~unaɾo~u~unan kijanijaro~u~uʡ, taŋasa i matini paŋaŋan ħan to~u~u sinsija. ina nijaro~u~uʡ maɾato~u~uɾo~u~u ira ko~u~u- patəro~u~uŋan, mararo~u~uʡo~u~uŋ, ɬ~ɮipiɬ~ɮ, mitəpar to~u~u ɾijaɾ siɾsiɾ ħan namaka b~b~vako~u~uŋ i makatəro~u~uŋ, o~u~u saaɾo~u~umanaj ko~u~u kab~b~vaɾaŋ a nijaro~u~uʡ, paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u sato~u~u i mararo~u~uʡo~u~uŋ ato~u~u ɬ~ɮipiɬ~ɮ ko~u~u paŋʦapaŋʦaħan. o~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ ko~u~u sao~u~usi to~u~u sinsija, to~u~uwa maɾato~u~uɾo~u~u ko~u~u nikasab~b~vənib~b~vənis: o~u~u patəro~u~uŋan kab~b~vaɾan a nijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u makatəro~u~uŋ ato~u~u ɬ~ɮipiɬ~ɮ i, o~u~u paŋʦapaŋʦaħan a nijaro~u~u. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw #.ə*.a*.*ʦ.ə*.**.b~b~vf.ə*.*ɬ~ɮ.**.ə*.*a.** .
S.FORM: Ciyaw Anang Paterungan a niyaru' U kaepudan nu lunalunan kiyaniyaru', tangasa i matini pangangan han tu Sinsiya. Ina niyaru' malatulu ira ku- Paterungan, Mararu'ung, Dipid, mitepar tu liyal silsil han namaka Bakung i makaterung, u saalumanay ku Kabalang a niyaru', padudu satu i Mararu'ung atu Dipid ku Pangcapangcahan. U Bakung ku sausi tu Sinsiya, tuwa malatulu ku nikasabenibenis: u Paterungan Kabalan a niyaru', u Makaterung atu Dipid i, u Pangcapangcahan a niyaru. Pi'arawan to lakaw #.E8.A1.8C.E6.94.BF.E5.8D.80.E5.8A.83 .
S.PHON: ʦijaw anaŋ patəro~u~uŋan a nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u kaəpo~u~uɬ~ɮan no~u~u ɾo~u~unaɾo~u~unan kijanijaro~u~uʡ, taŋasa i matini paŋaŋan ħan to~u~u sinsija. ina nijaro~u~uʡ maɾato~u~uɾo~u~u ira ko~u~u- patəro~u~uŋan, mararo~u~uʡo~u~uŋ, ɬ~ɮipiɬ~ɮ, mitəpar to~u~u ɾijaɾ siɾsiɾ ħan namaka b~b~vako~u~uŋ i makatəro~u~uŋ, o~u~u saaɾo~u~umanaj ko~u~u kab~b~vaɾaŋ a nijaro~u~uʡ, paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u sato~u~u i mararo~u~uʡo~u~uŋ ato~u~u ɬ~ɮipiɬ~ɮ ko~u~u paŋʦapaŋʦaħan. o~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ ko~u~u sao~u~usi to~u~u sinsija, to~u~uwa maɾato~u~uɾo~u~u ko~u~u nikasab~b~vənib~b~vənis: o~u~u patəro~u~uŋan kab~b~vaɾan a nijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u makatəro~u~uŋ ato~u~u ɬ~ɮipiɬ~ɮ i, o~u~u paŋʦapaŋʦaħan a nijaro~u~u. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw #.ə*.a*.*ʦ.ə*.**.b~b~vf.ə*.*ɬ~ɮ.**.ə*.*a.** .
